summary: Extra Innings subscriber FGotD archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is an Xtra Innings subscriber
AND the FGotD is archived

steps.action: WHEN the user views/focuses the FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND a Free Game of the Day pill displays left justified at the bottom of the game tile

**Note:** If a FGotD has a saving pitcher, the FGotD pill will not display when the game tile has focus. The saving pitcher information will display in its place.
